assertions.description: The DigitalCredential interface is exposed globally so wallet-issued credentials have a JS surface.
navigator.credentials (CredentialsContainer) is the entry point for the presentation request.
navigator.credentials.get accepts a 'digital' member describing the requested credential providers per the Digital Credentials API spec.
Document exposes a UserActivation interface (navigator.userActivation), which the spec requires for presentation requests.
AbortController is available so callers can cancel an in-flight presentation request as the spec requires.
Credential is the base interface; DigitalCredential extends it per the Credential Management spec.
